tags.label: GenerativeArtGallery — artwork16 (Time Crystals)
tags.description: Adapted from the ultra-optimised geometric crystal rosette sketch. Crystals arranged in a rosette pattern with radius variation (0.7–1.0× rOuter * sin(i*1.7)). Each crystal rotates independently and pulses via sin(tPhase * 1.4). Outer polygon uses main hue, inner uses complementary hue+180. WEBGL for smooth polygon rendering. Rebuilds crystal array on count or vertex-range change.
